# Project Plan

## Timeline

| Month | Milestone | Key deliverable |
|---|---|---|
| 1–2 | M1: Bug fixes, BiocCheck | Clean build; patch release |
| 2–4 | M2: API completeness | 5 new features; 7 issues closed |
| 3–5 | M3: Testing and CI | $\geq$75% coverage; CI on 3 platforms |
| 4–6 | M4: Documentation | 2 vignettes; simplified demos |
| 6–9 | M5: LLM navigation module | `igvChatUI/Server`; 3 providers |

Two Bioconductor releases are planned: after M1–M4, and after M5. Progress updates via Bioconductor Slack and an R Consortium blog post on completion.

## Budget

| Item | Hours | Rate | Cost |
|---|---|---|---|
| M1: Bug fixes and BiocCheck | 25 | $50/h | $1,250 |
| M2: API completeness | 25 | $50/h | $1,250 |
| M3: Testing and CI | 15 | $50/h | $750 |
| M4: Documentation | 15 | $50/h | $750 |
| M5: Module architecture and lifecycle | 15 | $50/h | $750 |
| M5: System prompt — navigation | 20 | $50/h | $1,000 |
| M5: System prompt — track management | 25 | $50/h | $1,250 |
| M5: JSON parser and error handling | 20 | $50/h | $1,000 |
| M5: Three-provider integration + CI mocks | 15 | $50/h | $750 |
| M5: Vignette and demo app | 15 | $50/h | $750 |
| Contingency (prompt engineering iteration) | 10 | $50/h | $500 |
| **Total** | **200** | | **$10,000** |

LLM API costs during development are covered by me. No hardware or infrastructure purchases requested. Payments tied to milestone completion: M1+M2 ($2,500), M3+M4 ($1,500), M5 ($6,000).
